title: Verify Happy Path: User sets a reminder via Trial Corner
description: Test that a user in the target cohort can navigate to the Trial Corner, use the 'Remind me' toggle, and see a confirmation.
preconditions: User is in the experiment cohort (has not watched content within 5 mins of trial activation).
User is on Day 0 or Day 1 of the trial.

steps.description: 1. Log in and navigate to the Homepage.
2. Observe the persistent 'Trial Mode' widget in the header.
4. On the 'Trial Corner' hub, locate the 'Manage Trial' section.
5. Click the toggle for 'Remind me 24h before trial ends.'

expected_result: The user is successfully redirected to the Trial Corner. The toggle activates, and a confirmation message (e.g., 'Reminder set!') is displayed. The 'remind-me-clicked' event is fired with 'trial corner' as the page source.
